faqs.question: Can I request additional photos?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can purchase extra retouched photos as an add-on.

faqs.question: What if I need more time during the shoot?
faqs.answer: You can extend your session with our +1 Hour Coverage add-on.

faqs.question: How do I book a session?
faqs.answer: Simply click the 'Schedule a Session' button and fill out the booking form.

faqs.question: Can I reschedule my session?
faqs.answer: Yes, sessions can be rescheduled with at least 48 hours' notice.

faqs.question: How many photos will I receive?
faqs.answer: Depending on the package, you'll receive 10–30 fully edited digital images.

faqs.question: How will I get my photos?
faqs.answer: Your photos will be delivered via a secure Google Drive link for easy access and sharing.

faqs.question: Do you provide printed photos or USB drives?
faqs.answer: No, we currently provide digital delivery only.

faqs.question: How long does it take to receive the edited photos?
faqs.answer: Final edited photos are usually delivered within 2–3 weeks after your session.

faqs.question: Do you edit all the photos?
faqs.answer: Yes, all delivered photos are professionally edited and retouched to our highest standard.

faqs.question: Do you travel to client locations?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can shoot at your home or an outdoor location. Travel fees may apply depending on distance.

faqs.question: Do you provide props for the photoshoot?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide some basic props. You're also welcome to bring your own for a personal touch.

faqs.question: What should we wear for the photoshoot?
faqs.answer: Neutral and coordinated colors work best. We'll be happy to share outfit tips to help you prepare.

faqs.question: Do you shoot indoors or outdoors?
faqs.answer: Both! We can capture your moments at our studio, your home, or an outdoor location of your choice.

faqs.question: Can I bring family members to the shoot?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Immediate family members are welcome. For larger groups, please let us know in advance.

faqs.question: What if my baby is fussy or not in the mood?
faqs.answer: No worries! We allow extra time and work at your baby's pace to ensure a relaxed experience.
